context:
Package: dplyr v1.2.0.9000
Description: A Grammar of Data Manipulation
Function: if_any
Parameters: .cols, .fns, .names
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal, expect_error, expect_identical, expect_snapshot

Function Code:
```r
if_any <- function(.cols, .fns, ..., .names = NULL) {
  context_local("across_if_fn", "if_any")
  context_local("across_frame", current_env())
  df <- across({{ .cols }}, .fns, ..., .names = .names)
  x <- dplyr_new_list(df)
  size <- vec_size(df)
  dplyr_list_pany(x, size = size)
}
```
